evals.prompt: Add a blog post about how AI is transforming crisis response in the Netherlands. It should cover how real-time data monitoring helps Dutch organizations respond faster to emerging crises. Make it authored by Corentin Merle, tagged with crisis and ai and netherlands, and mark it as featured.
evals.expected_output: A new MDX file in src/content/blog/ with correct frontmatter (region: nl, featured: true, valid image path, proper date) and substantive article content

assertions.name: file_created_in_correct_directory
assertions.description: A new .mdx file exists in src/content/blog/

assertions.name: frontmatter_has_required_fields
assertions.description: Frontmatter contains all required fields: title, description, date, author, region, tags, image, featured

assertions.name: region_is_nl
assertions.description: Region field is set to 'nl' (Netherlands-specific content)

assertions.name: featured_is_true
assertions.description: Featured field is set to true as requested

assertions.name: image_path_is_valid_relative
assertions.description: Image path starts with ../../brand/images/ and references an existing file

assertions.name: author_is_corentin
assertions.description: Author is 'Corentin Merle' as requested

assertions.name: body_has_substantive_content
assertions.description: MDX body has at least 3 paragraphs of actual article content

assertions.name: build_succeeds
assertions.description: npm run build completes without errors after adding the post

evals.prompt: Add a case study for a Belgian municipality called Antwerp City Council. They needed media monitoring across Flemish and French-language sources. We covered 12 municipalities, processed 800K data points, and delivered insights within 6 hours. Link it to the media-relations capability.
evals.expected_output: A new MDX file in src/content/case-studies/ with correct frontmatter including metrics array, valid capability slug, and structured Challenge/Approach/Outcome sections

assertions.name: file_created_in_correct_directory
assertions.description: A new .mdx file exists in src/content/case-studies/

assertions.name: capability_slug_is_valid
assertions.description: Capability field matches an existing capability slug (media-relations)

assertions.name: metrics_array_present
assertions.description: Frontmatter has a metrics array with the 3 specified metrics (municipalities, data points, time to insight)

assertions.name: region_chosen_appropriately
assertions.description: Region field is set (likely 'global' since Belgium isn't a configured region, or agent addresses the gap)

assertions.name: image_path_valid
assertions.description: Image path uses correct relative path to brand images

assertions.name: structured_sections
assertions.description: Body contains Challenge, Approach, and Outcome sections

assertions.name: build_succeeds
assertions.description: npm run build completes without errors

evals.prompt: We just brought on a new co-founder, Sophie van der Berg. She's a former diplomat with 15 years of experience in EU institutional relations and digital governance. Add her to the team. Also while you're at it, update the stats — we now cover 11 jurisdictions instead of 9, and we've processed 3.1M data points.
evals.expected_output: Updated src/data/team.ts with new team member and src/data/stats.ts with updated values

assertions.name: team_member_added
assertions.description: team.ts contains a new entry for Sophie van der Berg with name, role, and bio

assertions.name: role_is_cofounder
assertions.description: Sophie's role is 'Co-founder' (matching existing pattern)

assertions.name: bio_mentions_expertise
assertions.description: Bio references diplomacy, EU institutional relations, or digital governance

assertions.name: stats_jurisdictions_updated
assertions.description: Jurisdictions value changed from '9' to '11'

assertions.name: stats_datapoints_updated
assertions.description: Data points value changed from '2.4' to '3.1'

assertions.name: existing_team_preserved
assertions.description: William Masquelier and Corentin Merle entries are still present and unchanged

assertions.name: build_succeeds
assertions.description: npm run build completes without errors
